testcase.name: testExecutorRejectsEventsAfterShutdown
testcase.system-out: 19:39:27.090 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- WebhookEventExecutor initialized with cached thread pool executor 19:39:27.209 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- WebhookController initialized. Feishu secret: configured, Slack secret: configured 19:39:27.213 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Shutting down WebhookEventExecutor... 19:39:27.213 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- WebhookEventExecutor shut down successfully 19:39:27.215 [main] WARN tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Executor is not running, rejecting event: command 19:39:27.217 [main] WARN tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Executor already shut down

Feishu secret: configured, Slack secret: configured 19:39:27.369 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- Received Slack webhook event 19:39:27.369 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- Slack signature verified successfully 19:39:27.369 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- Slack event parsed: type=message, channel=unknown-channel, user=unknown-user 19:39:27.369 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Submitting async event processing: type=SLACK, group=unknown-channel, user=unknown-user 19:39:27.369 [pool-19-thread-1] DEBUG tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Processing event in virtual thread: type=SLACK, event=message 19:39:27.370 [pool-19-thread-1] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Session bound/created for event: session=test-session-id, group=unknown-channel 19:39:27.370 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Shutting down WebhookEventExecutor... 19:39:27.370 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- WebhookEventExecutor shut down successfully

testcase.system-out: 19:39:27.377 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- WebhookEventExecutor initialized with cached thread pool executor 19:39:27.377 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- WebhookController initialized. Feishu secret: configured, Slack secret: configured 19:39:27.379 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Submitting async event processing: type=CLI, group=test-group, user=test-user 19:39:27.379 [pool-21-thread-1] DEBUG tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Processing event in virtual thread: type=CLI, event=command 19:39:27.379 [pool-21-thread-1] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- CLI session created: test-session-id 19:39:27.380 [pool-21-thread-1] ERROR tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Error processing webhook event: type=CLI, group=test-group, error=Test exception java.lang.RuntimeException: Test exception at tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl.processEventInternal(WebhookEventExecutorImpl.java:124) at tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl.lambda$processAsync$0(WebhookEventExecutorImpl.java:93) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.Executors$RunnableAdapter.call(Executors.java:539) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:264) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1136) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:635) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:840) 19:39:27.880 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Shutting down WebhookEventExecutor... 19:39:27.880 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- WebhookEventExecutor shut down successfully

testcase.name: testHandleSlackEventExpiredTimestamp

testcase.name: testHandleSlackCallbackParsesApproveAction

Feishu secret: not configured, Slack secret: not configured 19:39:27.944 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- Received Slack interactive callback 19:39:27.944 [main] DEBUG tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- Slack signature verification skipped (no secret configured) 19:39:27.945 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- Slack callback parsed: session=worker-session-123, toolCallId=tool-call-456, approved=true 19:39:27.945 [SlackCallback-worker-session-123] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.controller.impl.WebhookControllerImpl -- Successfully processed Slack callback resume for session worker-session-123 19:39:27.945 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- Shutting down WebhookEventExecutor... 19:39:27.945 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.gateway.webhook.executor.impl.WebhookEventExecutorImpl -- WebhookEventExecutor shut down successfully
